title: Deliciously Crispy Greek Lamb Skewers
description: A crispy and flavorful Greek dish featuring lamb skewers with a hint of earthy spices and a pop of pink color, perfect for a hangover cure. This paleo-friendly recipe uses score-fat to add richness and texture.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, score-fat, garlic, oregano, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with the remaining marinade.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are crispy and cooked through.
Remove the skewers from the grill and brush with pink food coloring.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh parsley or oregano.
Repeat with remaining ingredients if necessary.
